movie.overview: A film projectionist longs to be a detective, and puts his meager skills to work when he is framed by a rival for stealing his girlfriend's father's pocketwatch.
movie.tagline: Every inch of footage holds such a laugh!
movie.title: Sherlock Jr.

cast.name: Joe Keaton
cast.character: Girl's Father / Man on Film Screen

cast.name: Doris Deane
cast.character: Girl Who Loses Dollar Outside Cinema (uncredited)
